subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! From the trees I hear Thy remembrance and praise, and from the stones Thy attributes and that which was hidden from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اسمع من الاشجار ذکرک و ثنائک و من الاحجار وصفک و ما کان مستورا عن
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power of prayer, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment
